channel.title: LobangKing.sg — Singapore Lobangs
channel.description: Verified daily promos, freebies and discounts across Singapore.

item.title: Krispy Kreme S’pore Buy 6 Assorted Doughnuts, Get 3 Glazed Free on 17 July 2026
item.description: Celebrating 89 sweet years

item.description: Save on Acronis True Image plans with a limited-time coupon for backup and cyber protection.

item.description: Save instantly on eligible Singapore Airlines return fares when paying with an eligible DBS or POSB card.

item.title: Up to 55% off designer handbags, shoes & watches
item.description: Official Michael Kors sale with further reductions across designer handbags, shoes, watches and clothing — over 1,000 styles. Example: the Ava extra-small Saffiano crossbody is down from $430 to $189.

item.title: Designer leather bags on sale + free shipping
item.description: Coach Singapore's official leather bag sale — exclusive deals on handbags and signature styles, with free shipping for a limited time. New customers get 10% off their first order with code HELLO10.
